category_sources: Official GitHub README describes igrep as running grep/ripgrep interactively to pick results and open matches.
source_facts.description says igrep is interactive grep.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses igrep - Interactive Grep.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains usage, options, keybindings, editor support, and installation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/konradsz/igrep, so repo discovery was skipped per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README says igrep uses grep/ripgrep behavior and provides interactive result selection.
